message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>The aim of this study is predicted 200.000 cases of Covid-19 in Spain. Covid-19 Spanish confirmed data obtained from Worldometer from 01 March 2020 – 17 April 2020. The data from 01 March 2020 – 10 April 2020 using to fitting with data from 11 April – 17 April 2020. For the evaluation of the forecasting accuracy measures, we use mean absolute percentage error (MAPE). Based on the results of SutteARIMA fitting data, the accuracy of SutteARIMA for the period 11 April 2020 - 17 April 2020 is 0.61% and we forecast 20.000 confirmed cases of Spain by the WHO situation report day 90/91 which is 19 April 2020 / 20 April 2020.</jats:p>
title: The date predicted 200.000 cases of Covid-19 in Spain using SutteARIMA

reference.unstructured: Yang Y , Peng F , Wang R , Guan K , Jiang T , Xu G , et al. The deadly coronaviruses: The 2003 SARS pandemic and the 2020 novel coronavirus epidemic in China. J Autoimmun 2020:102434. https://doi.org/10.1016/jjaut.2020.102434.

reference.article-title: Real-time forecasts of the COVID-19 epidemic in China from February 5th to February 24th, 2020

reference.article-title: A Comparison of α-Sutte Indicator and ARIMA Methods in Renewable Energy Forecasting in Indonesia
